title: dryopteris prolifera
intro: Dryopteris prolifera, also known as the autumn fern or Japanese shield fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Dryopteris prolifera are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
